meaning: n.犬齿,犬牙,[建筑]齿饰,犬牙饰
examples: Dogtooth violet of western North America having bright yellow flowers.
California dogtooth violet with creamy white flowers sometimes yellow-tinged.
It puts 'Dogtooth,' a Greek drama about a twisted family that premiered last year at Cannes, at the top rank, and has many other lesser-known picks in the mix.
